zh.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose是William Brewes和Mary Roos的兒子，於大約1273年出生在英國英格蘭。他和Agnes de Clifford至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1311年12月在英國英格蘭素可布拉波享年39歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose是William Brewes和Mary Roos的儿子，于大约1273年出生在英国英格兰。他和Agnes de Clifford至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1311年12月在英国英格兰素可布拉波享年39岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾特波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose was born about 1273, in England, United Kingdom as the son of William Brewes and Mary Roos. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Agnes de Clifford. He died in December 1311, in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose est né environ 1273, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William Brewes et Mary Roos. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Agnes de Clifford. Il est décédé en décembre 1311, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose wurde um 1273 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William Brewes und Mary Roos geboren. Er hatte mit Agnes de Clifford mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1311 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose è nato il circa 1273 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William Brewes e Mary Roos. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Agnes de Clifford. Morì nel dicembre 1311, nel Bramber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Tetbury, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braoseは約1273年にイギリスイギリスでWilliam BrewesとMary Roosの息子として生まれた。彼はAgnes de Cliffordとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1311年12月にイギリスイギリススセックスブランバーで39歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテトブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose(은)는 대략 1273년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William Brewes(와)과 Mary Roos의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes de Clifford(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 테트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose nasceu aproximadamente 1273, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William Brewes e Mary Roos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Agnes de Clifford. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1311, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose родился около 1273 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали William Brewes и Mary Roos. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Agnes de Clifford. Он умер декабрь 1311 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности тетбури, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Braose nació aproximadamente 1273, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de William Brewes y Mary Roos. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Agnes de Clifford. Murió en diciembre de 1311, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
